title: Banoffee Pie
description: Easter calls for something special, how about a shower gel scented like caramel-like, creamy banoffee pie? Made with fresh banana to keep skin soft and soothed.
ingredients: Dipteryx Odorata Seed Extract (Tonka Seed Extract)

images.alt: A smooth, circular dollop of creamy yellow shower gel with a glossy finish. The thick, opaque liquid features tiny air bubbles and is centered against a clean, neutral grey background.

A hand holds a bottle of Lush Banoffee Pie shower gel under a stream of water in a shower. The clear bottle reveals the creamy yellow gel inside, and the black label features white text. Mint green tiles are in the background.

A person's hands are shown in a shower, with one hand holding an upside-down bottle of Lush Banoffee Pie shower gel. A thick stream of the creamy yellow gel is being squeezed into the palm of the other hand against a background of mint green tiles.
A close-up of a person’s arms and hands in a shower, lathering a light, soapy foam. The background features mint green wall tiles and the soft, vertical spray of water from a showerhead.
A person's side profile in the shower, applying a light, bubbly soap lather to their shoulder. The background features light mint green wall tiles and the soft spray of falling water.

A person's back and shoulder are shown from behind in a shower as they apply a light, creamy soap lather. The background features light mint green wall tiles and the steady, soft spray of falling water.
